nasb.text: Miriam the prophetess, Aaron’s sister, took the timbrel in her hand, and all the women went out after her with timbrels and with dancing.

esv.text: Then Miriam the prophetess, the sister of Aaron, took a tambourine in her hand, and all the women went out after her with tambourines and dancing.

cnv.text: 亞倫的姊姊女先知米利暗，手裡拿著鼓；所有的婦女都跟著她出來，擊鼓跳舞。

ccb.text: 亚伦的姐姐米利暗是个先知，她手拿小鼓，带领妇女击鼓跳舞，
